## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make format-check`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make doctor` (dataset/docs/contracts sync, see `AGENTS.md §12`)
- [ ] `make verify-landing`

## Data Pipeline

- [ ] No generated artifacts changed
- [ ] Generated artifacts were rebuilt with `make build`
- [ ] New or changed data passes `scripts/verify_pipeline.py`
- [ ] Source licensing/reuse status is documented
